messages.content:
Je récupère les prix des skins csgo dans un json, voici un exemple:
{"\u2605 M9 Bayonet | Damascus Steel (Factory New)": {
  "steam": {"last_24h": 0, "last_7d": 854.75, "last_30d": 621.92, "last_90d": 646.31}, 
  "bitskins": {"price": "949.99", "instant_sale_price": null},
  "lootfarm": 1090.18,
  "csgotm": "958.668",
  "csmoney": {"price": 522.61},
  "skinport": {"suggested_price": 602.91, "starting_at": 865.34},
  "csgotrader": {"price": 721.0},
  "csgoempire": 781.46,
  "swapgg": 930.65,
  "csgoexo": 800.8, 
  "cstrade": {"price": 1282.84},
  "skinwallet": null,
  "buff163": {"starting_at": {"price": 862.34}, "highest_order": {"price": 817.4}}}

Mon objectif final est de faire un bot en Java qui récupère les prix des skins csgo dans ce json, et me renvoie les meilleurs trades possibles en fonction de leur profit.
Comment je pourrais structurer mon code en java de la meilleur façon en utilisant les pricipes fondamentales de la POO, pour récupérer ces informations ? "steam", "bitskins", etc sont des marchands différents
tu peux me donner l'implementation de MerchantFactory
ce ne serait pas mieux plutot de stocker des instances de chaque merchant dans un cache plutot que de les créer à chaque fois qu'on charge les prix d'un skin ?
si un jour je récupère les informations dans un autre json qui n'a pas du tout la même structure, je fais comment ?

for my csgo tradeup simulator and finder bot, I need to generate all combinations possible for every skin. I don't know how to choice my skins combination, for the moment I just take one version of the skin for each wear (using the average float of the wear, like 0.11 for minimal wear). But to increase the efficiency, I need to change this mechanic. I have a class TradeUps with methods to get the average profatibility of the tradeup, the cost... using the list of skins in it. So how to?
this doesn't work because as I said, the float wear is a Range with min and max value (java Float).

forgot your answer. This is not the right method. So to recap. I want to get tradeups with the more profitability. A tradeup is an instance of the class with a list of 10 skins of the same Rarity (ex: MIL-SPEC), the tradeup cost is just the sum of all prices of all skins, and the tradeup average skin price is the sum of (all result skin's price of tradeup collections times the percentage of their own collection in the trade) divided by 10. I forgot to tell you that skins of csgo has a float range with a minimum wear and maximum wear float value. What I want to do, is generate a lot of tradeups (maybe all possible but it wont be possible because it will generate tons of tradeups). The wear of the won skin in the tradeup is the float average of skins in the tradeup. That's why I want to simulate a lot of tradeups. I also forgot to tell you that a skin price depend on his float, I already a method to get his price from his float.
oublie l'idée de générer des tradeups aléatoires, je veux l'approche la plus parfaite. Pareil, ne choisis pas le float moyen entre le min et le max.
garde l'usage de la PriorityQueue. En revanche, génère toutes les combinaisons possibles en essayant d'en éliminer au préalable pour ne pas en générer des millions
